# Card Onboarding Worker

An SQS-triggered Lambda worker that runs business validations and forwards inputs to the orchestrator.

## 🧭 Responsibilities
* Evaluates individual row records from worker queue.
* Performs deep business validation rules (email regex, card types VISA/MASTERCARD/AMEX, numeric card number).
* Invokes `onboard-service` API using autogenerated code-gen clients.
* Filters logging to mask sensitive cardholder PII (card number masking).
* Maps status codes to SQS failure conditions (handles 5xx and timeouts as retryable; maps 4xx as non-retryable).
